stimulus: Visual artist Nick Cave seeks to give people the chance to be ______blank his artistic process. For instance, in his traveling exhibition Soundsuits, viewers are invited to put on the wearable sculptures and contribute movements and sounds that become part of the installation's documentary record.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice C is the best answer because "engaged in" means actively participating, which fits the description of viewers putting on the sculptures and contributing to the installation. Choice A is incorrect because "anxious about" suggests worry; the text describes participation, not apprehension. Choice B is incorrect because "slowed by" suggests being hindered, but viewers are taking part, not being delayed. Choice D is incorrect because "completed by" suggests being made whole; the text describes participation, not personal completeness.
